title: Alphabet Blocks
description: A mod that adds decorative letter blocks
body:
![Alphabet Blocks](https://file.garden/ZWRLDl4ycxnRjvXs/minecraft-alphabetblocks.png)\
This is a small mod that adds a few letter blocks for decoration. I based these textures on a real set of letter block toys; the fact that the J block is green like JEI's logo is coincidence.
